entities.summary: Dominant human occupying power across many cities and settlements; land fractured by chaotic forces; heroic medieval visual tone (Gondor/Rohan as references only).
openQuestions: Whether the kingdom is a playable faction choice or the political arena surrounding the other factions
Precise geography vs setting name Tessera

entities.summary: Evil coalition of living creatures and ethereal spirits; dark crusade / fractured-creator heraldry (Roman eagle retired); led by Luceran the Hollow.
openQuestions: How Imperium authority ties to Frangitur, the Nefarium Shroud, and Luceran's remaining agency

entities.summary: Religious and noble oligarchy; selective; associated with higher social classes; refined architecture; hostile toward the woodland faction; can shift good/evil via player influence (proposal).
openQuestions: Relationship to Creo/Frangitur and the gods
Player influence thresholds, lock-in, and destruction conditions

entities.summary: Umbrella culture of regional woodland/coastal tribes molded by local land and Loa/gods; shared world/Gaia council tradition with possible inter-tribe conflict; adversarial with Cristallo; tonal barbarian/druid references. First named clan: The Thalassar (thalassar).
openQuestions: Collective decision rules when chieftains disagree
Named tribes / philosophical traditions for relationship-graph nodes — name from land; prioritize Act 0 / Act 1
Thalassar (thalassar): mask Muirthalia + relic Anál Muir (anal_muir) locked; Sea of Whispers false patron; succession rite; council seat
Player influence thresholds, lock-in, and destruction conditions

entities.summary: Arrotrebae clan south of the Calrenoth peninsula (Act 0) and coastal/seafarer power in the Act 1 southwest theater; advanced organized pirate culture; Greek–Irish naming theme. Public liturgy mask Muirthalia; false patron The Sea of Whispers; rite-gated minor leadership relic Anál Muir (anal_muir), deliberately weaker than the Nefarium Shroud. Display name locked Dom + owner 2026-07-20.
openQuestions: Public mask Muirthalia locked; false patron The Sea of Whispers (sea_of_whispers = Luceran lieutenant plant) — reveal timing open
Anál Muir (anal_muir) locked; literal vs abstracted water-walking / enhanced breath still open
Council membership vs conflict with other Arrotrebae tribes

entities.summary: Container for multiple orc warbands rather than one unified faction; individual warbands may support or oppose the Imperium based on Nefarium exposure and hatred of Luceran.
openQuestions: Stable warband IDs and names — underflow seeded for Act 0
Which warband possessed the Nefarium Shroud and why
Name of the great orc leader slain by Luceran

entities.summary: Minor orc warband inland/east of the Calrenoth peninsula corridor (Act 0 / Landfall). Land-derived: subsurface underflow beneath the ridge feeding the watershed. Same original water cult as The Thalassar, but rite perverted — false patron The Sea of Whispers (Luceran lieutenant plant). Public liturgy mask: Grakk-Maren (vs Thalassar Muirthalia). Owner confirmed 2026-07-20.
openQuestions: Imperium / Nefarium stance in Act 0 corridor
